scripts.build: npm run build -w @clipforge/db && npm run build -w @clipforge/backend && npm run build -w @clipforge/worker && npm run build -w @clipforge/frontend
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @clipforge/db && npm run build -w @clipforge/backend
scripts.build:worker: npm run build -w @clipforge/db && npm run build -w @clipforge/worker
